detail.name: NRMA Offset Home Loan
detail.description: For customers who want flexibility to pay down their loan sooner and access additional features such as offset accounts.

features.additionalInfo: Up to six 100% Offset Accounts per loan. Full offset if Variable or Fixed. Offsets for QANTAS Money Home Loans must be in the same customer number as the home loan.
Unlimited additional repayments if variable, Max $20,000 p.a without penalty for fixed loans

eligibility.additionalInfo: Credit and Lending Criteria, Fees and Charges Apply

fees.name: Manual Redraw Fee
fees.additionalInfo: Payable each time we agree to a redraw request you make otherwise than through Bendigo e-banking

fees.name: Break Cost Fee
fees.additionalInfo:
Payable each time any of the following Break Events occur during a Fixed Rate Period: 
• at your request, we agree to change the Annual Percentage Rate under your Contract; 
• you repay your Loan Account balance in full; or 
• you make an additional repayment (by repaying more than your required repayments 
under your Contract) where the total of all additional repayments you have made 
since the start of the Fixed Rate Period or, if later, the anniversary of that date, that 
exceeds $20,000.00.
